headline: A Look At Pfizer (PFE) Valuation As Long Term Returns And DCF Views Diverge
summary: Pfizer (PFE) remains in focus for income oriented investors, with recent returns ranging from a 2.1% decline over the past week to a 10.7% total return over the past year. See our latest analysis for Pfizer. The recent 1 day share price return of 2.49% and 7 day share price return of 2.06% contrast with a year to date share price return of 5.56%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 10.72% sits against a 3 year total shareholder return of 21.03%, hinting at momentum that has picked up more...

headline: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) and Astellas Report Positive Phase 3 EV-304 Results for PADCEV Plus Keytruda in Bladder Cancer
summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is among the 13 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On February 27, 2026, Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) and Astellas Pharma announced positive Phase 3 EV-304 results for PADCEV, a Nectin-4-directed antibody-drug conjugate, in combination with Keytruda in patients with muscle-invasive bladder cancer eligible for cisplatin-based chemotherapy.
